caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a black headset, and a green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVE20 SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and grey pants behind him to the right. The wall in the background is decorated with several framed photographs. Across the bottom of the scene, there is a logo on the left that reads "THE" and a red logo on the right that says "ROCKY FLY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expression and mouth position while talking, occasionally closing his eyes or looking slightly to the side, while the camera and background elements remain stationary.
